title: Fix sound playback — BGM and click/tap sounds not playing

requirements.summary: Fix background music playback on Dashboard page with proper autoplay handling and FloatingMusicControl state synchronization
acceptanceCriteria: Background music begins playing on the Dashboard page after the first user interaction (click or tap).
The FloatingMusicControl button correctly shows the playing state when music is active.
Pausing and resuming via the FloatingMusicControl works without errors.
No console errors related to audio playback or missing audio files.

file_operations.description: Fix the useBGM hook to correctly load and play the BGM audio file. Update the audio source path to reference the correct file in public/assets/ (e.g., '/assets/Dreamy.mp3.m4a'). Implement autoplay policy handling by adding a user interaction listener that resumes playback on first click/tap. Ensure the isPlaying state accurately reflects the audio element's playing state by adding 'play' and 'pause' event listeners. Add error handling for audio loading failures with console warnings.

Ensure the FloatingMusicControl component correctly reflects the play/pause state from useBGM. Verify the toggle button uses the isPlaying state to show the correct icon (Play or Pause). Add visual feedback when music state changes. Ensure volume slider changes are properly applied to the BGM audio element.

Initialize background music playback on the Dashboard page using the useBGM hook. Call the play method after component mount and on first user interaction. Add a one-time click/tap listener to resume audio if autoplay was blocked by browser policy. Ensure BGM starts reliably when the user enters the Dashboard.

requirements.summary: Fix click/tap sound effects throughout the app and page-specific audio playback
acceptanceCriteria: A click/tap sound plays on every click or tap interaction throughout the app.
Page-specific sounds (chat hello sound, lock screen unlock sound, memories page audio) play correctly on their respective triggers.
Audio files are correctly referenced with valid public asset paths.
No 404 errors for audio files in the browser network tab.
Sound hooks gracefully handle cases where audio cannot be played (e.g., permission denied) without crashing the app.

file_operations.description: Fix the useDoubleKnockSound hook to correctly load and play the Double Knock audio file on user interactions. Update the audio source path to '/assets/Double Knock.mp3.m4a'. Add proper error handling for audio loading and playback failures with try-catch blocks. Ensure the throttle mechanism (120ms) prevents overlapping sounds. Add event listeners for 'click' and 'touchstart' that respect browser autoplay restrictions by only playing after user gesture.

Fix the useClickSound hook to reliably synthesize and play the two-note bell chime on user interactions. Ensure the Web Audio API context is properly initialized and resumed on first user gesture to comply with autoplay policy. Add error handling for AudioContext creation failures. Verify the click and touchstart event listeners are correctly attached and the 120ms throttle prevents sound overlap.

Fix the hello sound playback on ChatPage mount. Update the audio file path to '/assets/Hello.mp3.m4a'. Add error handling for audio loading failures with try-catch block. Ensure the sound plays after first user interaction if autoplay is blocked. Add a user gesture listener to trigger playback if needed.

Fix the unlock sound playback when the correct code is entered. Update the audio file path to reference a valid asset (e.g., '/assets/Blip Bleep.mp3.m4a' as the unlock confirmation sound). Add error handling for audio loading and playback failures. Ensure the sound plays on successful authentication before navigation.

Fix the audio playback on OurMemoriesPage entry. Update the audio file path to reference a valid background audio track (e.g., '/assets/Dreamy.mp3.m4a' for ambient memory music). Add autoplay policy handling by attempting playback on mount and resuming on first user interaction. Add error handling for audio loading failures. Ensure the audio element is properly cleaned up on component unmount.

requirements.summary: Audit and fix all audio file references to ensure they point to existing assets
acceptanceCriteria: All audio file paths used in hooks and pages resolve to existing files.
If a file is missing, it is either added to public assets or replaced with a Web Audio API synthesized equivalent.
No 404 network errors for any audio resource.

file_operations.description: Audit the audio file path in useBGM and update it to '/assets/Dreamy.mp3.m4a' which exists in the assets list. Add a comment documenting the audio file location.
Audit the audio file path in useDoubleKnockSound and update it to '/assets/Double Knock.mp3.m4a' which exists in the assets list. Add a comment documenting the audio file location.
Audit the hello sound file path and update it to '/assets/Hello.mp3.m4a' which exists in the assets list. Add a comment documenting the audio file location.

Audit the unlock sound file path and update it to '/assets/Blip Bleep.mp3.m4a' which exists in the assets list as a suitable unlock confirmation sound. Add a comment documenting the audio file location.
Audit the background audio file path and update it to '/assets/Dreamy.mp3.m4a' which exists in the assets list as ambient music. Add a comment documenting the audio file location.

Verify the Web Audio API synthesized sound is working correctly as a fallback. Since this hook synthesizes sound programmatically, ensure the AudioContext is properly initialized and no external audio file is required. Add comments documenting that this hook uses Web Audio API synthesis and does not require asset files.
